conditions: Right-edge closest piling (~4 ft) is sharp with visible structure; farther pilings (11–30 ft markers) are not clearly discernible, mostly off-frame or lost in haze, so reliable range is limited to the near piling only.

No clear view of distant pilings or bottom, so visibility is between 10 and 15 ft; closer to 10 ft since background is very muted.

Closest 4ft and 11ft pilings on right are clear with visible texture; the 14ft/back-left region shows as a hazy silhouette with little detail; no distinct 30ft pilings or bottom features are visible. This matches the 15 ft guideline where the 14ft piling is present but faded.

Sandy bottom is clearly visible and bright. Multiple pilings in the distance (including those around 30 ft) are visible with clear outlines and some texture, though slightly hazier than the 35 ft reference but better than the 25 ft silhouette case. Conditions correspond to approximately 30 ft visibility.

Closest and 11 ft pilings on right are sharp with clear texture; mid-left (~14 ft) piling is visible but somewhat hazy; far 30 ft pilings are not distinctly visible as separate structures, just a broad blue column with no clear silhouette. This matches conditions where the 14 ft piling is hazy and farther pilings are essentially lost.

The closest 4 ft piling at right is sharp with clear texture. The mid-right (~11 ft) and back-left (~14 ft) pilings are visible but somewhat hazy; the 14 ft piling is more of a silhouette without clear texture. The far 30 ft pilings are not distinctly visible as separate structures, and the scene fades into blue before that distance. Sandy bottom is visible beneath but distance-limiting factor is water clarity, which matches the guideline for when the 14 ft piling is hazy/faded silhouette.

Closest 4 ft piling on right is very sharp with clear encrusting organisms. The mid/right and left pilings around 11–14 ft are visible but somewhat hazy. The far 30 ft pilings are not distinctly visible as separate silhouettes; background fades into uniform blue-green. This corresponds to clarity reaching solidly to the 14 ft piling but not to 30 ft.
